info.title: SmartThings API
info.description: The SmartThings API provides access to manage devices, locations, rooms, scenes, rules, subscriptions, schedules, and installed apps in the SmartThings ecosystem. Control IoT devices, automate routines, and integrate with the SmartThings platform.

get.description: Get the full status of a device

BearerAuth.description: Personal Access Token or OAuth2 Bearer token
